case_title: IN RE: PAVEL CHEKMAZOV et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHEKMAZOV, VADIM JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER CHEKMAZOV, VADIM CHEKMAZOV, PAVEL CHEKMAZOV, KEVIN HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

DECREE CHANGING NAME THE COURT ORDERS THE PRESENT NAME OF PAVEL CHEKMAZOV IS CHANGED TO PAUL ADLER. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THE PRESENT NAME OF KEVIN CHEKMAZOV IS CHANGED TO KEVIN ADLER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEKMAZOV, VADIM CHEKMAZOV, PAVEL CHEKMAZOV, KEVIN

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta Norris;
Clerk:P. Dias/R.Goulding; Reporter: Loretta Najera
Vadim Chekmazov and Marina Alexandera Chekmazov appearing on behalf of minors Paul Chekmazov and Kevin Chekmazov are sworn and examined. The Court grants the Petition for Decree Changing Names to Paul Adler and Kevin Adler, respectively. Decree signed in open court.
